---
title: "HM_figures"
author: "Abby Lewis"
date: "2026-01-20"
output: html_document
---

This file makes figure 2 (data) and figure 3 (totals/percents)

Load data and packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
source("../analysis/hm_style.R")
source("../R/make_lm_label.R")

part <- read_csv(here::here("processed_data", "L2- partitioned_and_gap_filled.csv")) %>%
  rename(DateTime = TIMESTAMP) %>%
  mutate(
    CH4_umol_m2_h = CH4_filled * (60 * 60),
    CO2_umol_m2_h = NEE * (60 * 60),
    MIU_VALVE = factor(MIU_VALVE,
      levels = chamber_levels,
      labels = chamber_labels2
    ),
    date = as.Date(DateTime)
  ) %>%
  filter(DateTime <= "2025-11-15")

met <- read_csv("../processed_data/met_2025_gapfilled.csv")

soil_temp <- read_csv(here::here("processed_data", "soil_temp.csv"))  %>%
  mutate(MIU_VALVE = factor(MIU_VALVE,
                            levels = chamber_levels,
                            labels = chamber_labels2
  ))
```

Summary stats

```{r}
part %>%
  mutate(filled = ifelse(is.na(CH4) & !is.na(CH4_filled), T, F)) %>%
  group_by(MIU_VALVE) %>%
  summarize(n = sum(filled),
            pct = n/sum(!is.na(CH4_filled))*100) %>%
  summarize(min(pct),
            max(pct))
```

Data summary (Figure 2)

```{r}
min_annual <- min(part$date[!is.na(part$CH4_umol_m2_h)])
max_annual <- max(part$date[!is.na(part$CH4_umol_m2_h)])

annual <- part %>%
  group_by(date, MIU_VALVE) %>%
  summarize(CH4_umol_m2_h = mean(CH4_umol_m2_h, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = CH4_umol_m2_h, color = MIU_VALVE)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date(min_annual), as.Date(max_annual))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color.gradient, name = "Chamber") +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop(CH[4] ~ "flux", "(µmol" ~ m^-2 ~ h^-1 * ")")))

annual_AT <- met %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(TIMESTAMP)) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarize(AirTC_Avg = mean(AirTC_Avg, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = AirTC_Avg)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5, color = "grey20") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date(min_annual), as.Date(max_annual))) +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Air temp.", " (ºC)")))

annual_ST <- soil_temp %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(timestamp)) %>%
  group_by(date, MIU_VALVE) %>%
  summarize(Temp_C = mean(Temp_C, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = Temp_C, color = MIU_VALVE)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5) +
  #coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date(min_annual), as.Date(max_annual))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color.gradient, name = "Chamber") +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Air temp.", " (ºC)")))

annual_wl <- part %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarize(Depth_cm = mean(Depth_cm, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = Depth_cm)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5, color = "grey20") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date(min_annual), as.Date(max_annual))) +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Water level", " (cm)")))

start_date <- "2025-03-27"
end_date <- "2025-04-06"

focal_ch4 <- part %>%
  filter(date %in% seq.Date(as.Date(start_date), as.Date(end_date), by = "1 day")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DateTime, y = CH4_umol_m2_h, color = MIU_VALVE)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color.gradient, name = "Chamber") +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop(CH[4] ~ "flux ", "(µmol" ~ m^-2 ~ h^-1 * ")")))

focal_co2 <-part %>%
  filter(date %in% seq.Date(as.Date(start_date), as.Date(end_date), by = "1 day")) %>%
  mutate(CO2_umol_m2_h  =ifelse(hour(DateTime) %in% 8:19, CO2_umol_m2_h, NA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DateTime, y = CO2_umol_m2_h, color = MIU_VALVE)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color.gradient, name = "Chamber") +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop(CO[2] ~ "flux ", "(µmol" ~ m^-2 ~ h^-1 * ")")))

focal_wl <- part %>%
  filter(date %in% seq.Date(as.Date(start_date), as.Date(end_date), by = "1 day")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DateTime, y = Depth_cm)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5, color = "grey20") +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Water level", " (cm)")))

focal_AT <- met %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(TIMESTAMP)) %>%
  filter(date %in% seq.Date(as.Date(start_date), as.Date(end_date), by = "1 day")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TIMESTAMP, y = AirTC_Avg)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey80") +
  geom_line(size = 0.5, color = "grey20") +
  theme_hm +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Air temp.", " (ºC)")))

## Still haven't decided how I want this— do I want annual drivers?
# Try with soil temp then decide

comb <- ggpubr::ggarrange(
  annual +
    guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 4)) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title.position = "top"
    ),
  patchwork::wrap_plots(
    focal_ch4 +
      scale_x_datetime(
        date_breaks = "5 day",
        date_labels = "%d %b"
      ) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      ),
    focal_wl +
      scale_x_datetime(
        date_breaks = "5 day",
        date_labels = "%d %b"
      ) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      ),
    focal_AT +
      scale_x_datetime(
        date_breaks = "5 day",
        date_labels = "%d %b"
      ) +
      theme(legend.position = "none"),
    ncol = 1
  ),
  ncol = 2, widths = c(1.7, 1), labels = c("a", "b"),
  legend = "bottom", common.legend = T
)

comb
ggsave("../figures/Figure 2 - Data.jpg", dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 4)

comb <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  a = patchwork::wrap_plots(
    annual +
      guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 4)) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom"
      ) +
      ggtitle("Daily mean"),
    annual_wl +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      ),
    annual_AT,
    ncol = 1, design = c("A
                          A
                          B
                          C")
  ),
  b = patchwork::wrap_plots(
    focal_ch4 +
      scale_x_datetime(date_breaks = "5 day", date_labels = "%d %b") +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom"
      ) +
      ggtitle("Measured"),
    focal_wl +
      scale_x_datetime(date_breaks = "5 day", date_labels = "%d %b") +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      ),
    focal_AT +
      scale_x_datetime(date_breaks = "5 day", date_labels = "%d %b") +
      theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y = element_blank()
      ),
    ncol = 1,
    design = c("A
               A
               B
               C")
  ),
  ncol = 2, widths = c(2, 1),
  guides = "collect"
) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = list(c("a","","", "b")),
    theme = theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.justification = "left",
      legend.title.position = "top"
    )) &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold"))

comb

ggsave("../figures/Figure 2 - Data drivers.jpg", dpi = 300, width = 7, height = 5)
```

The importance of hot moment events increases with temperature (Figure 3)

```{r}
hm_df <- part %>%
  filter(!is.na(CH4_umol_m2_h)) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  filter(length(unique(MIU_VALVE)) == 12)

hot_moments <- hm_df %>%
  group_by(MIU_VALVE) %>%
  mutate(
    hot_moment_quant_998 = ifelse(CH4_umol_m2_h >=
      quantile(CH4_umol_m2_h,
        probs = 0.998, na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    "hot", "not"
    ),
    hot_moment_quant_99 = ifelse(CH4_umol_m2_h >=
      quantile(CH4_umol_m2_h,
        probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    "hot", "not"
    ),
    hot_moment_quant_95 = ifelse(CH4_umol_m2_h >=
      quantile(CH4_umol_m2_h,
        probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE
      ),
    "hot", "not"
    )
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    sum = sum(CH4_umol_m2_h, na.rm = T),
    hot_sum_998 = sum(CH4_umol_m2_h[hot_moment_quant_998 == "hot"], na.rm = T),
    hot_sum_99 = sum(CH4_umol_m2_h[hot_moment_quant_99 == "hot"], na.rm = T),
    hot_sum_95 = sum(CH4_umol_m2_h[hot_moment_quant_95 == "hot"], na.rm = T),
    min = min(DateTime),
    max = max(DateTime)
  )

annual_df <- hot_moments %>%
  mutate(
    Temp_C = sub(" ºC", "", str_extract(as.character(MIU_VALVE), "[0-9]+\\.*[0-9]* ºC")),
    Temp_C = as.numeric(sub("mb", "0", Temp_C)),
    dif = as.numeric(difftime(max, min, "hours")),
    annual_flux = sum * 130 / 60 / 1000 / 1000 / dif * 365 # Convert hourly fluxes to annual
  )

annual_label <- make_lm_label(
  data = annual_df,
  xvar = "Temp_C",
  yvar = "annual_flux"
)

annual <- ggplot(
  annual_df,
  aes(x = Temp_C, y = annual_flux)
) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = MIU_VALVE),
    color = "black", shape = 21,
    stroke = 0.5, size = 2
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = annual_label$label),
    hjust = 0, vjust = 1.1,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3, data = data.frame()
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color.gradient, name = "Chamber") +
  theme_hm +
  ylab(expression(atop("Growing season", "emissions (mol" ~ m^-2 ~ yr^-1 * ")"))) +
  xlab("Temperature treatment (ºC above ambient)") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title.position = "top"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2))

top_pct <- hot_moments %>%
  mutate(
    Temp_C = sub(" ºC", "", str_extract(as.character(MIU_VALVE), "[0-9]+\\.*[0-9]* ºC")),
    Temp_C = as.numeric(sub("mb", "0", Temp_C)),
    hm_pct_998 = hot_sum_998 / sum * 100,
    hm_pct_99 = hot_sum_99 / sum * 100,
    hm_pct_95 = hot_sum_95 / sum * 100
  ) %>%
  select(Temp_C, MIU_VALVE, hm_pct_998, hm_pct_99, hm_pct_95) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(hm_pct_95, hm_pct_99, hm_pct_998)) %>%
  mutate(
    name = factor(
      name,
      levels = c("hm_pct_95", "hm_pct_99", "hm_pct_998"),
      labels = c(
        "Top 5% of measurements",
        "Top 1% of measurements",
        "Top 0.2% of measurements"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  mutate(
    model  = list(lm(value ~ Temp_C)),
    p      = summary(model[[1]])$coefficients[2, 4],
    r2     = summary(model[[1]])$r.squared,
    median = median(value)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Create label dataframe (one row per facet)
label_df <- top_pct %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarise(
    p = first(p),
    r2 = first(r2),
    median = first(median),
    label = paste0(
      "  Median = ", round(median, 1), " %",
      "\n  R² = ", round(r2, 2),
      "\n  p = ", round(p, 3)
    )
  )

top_pct_fig <- top_pct %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp_C, y = value)) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", color = "black",
    data = ~ subset(.x, p < 0.05)
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", color = "grey70",
    data = ~ subset(.x, p >= 0.05),
    lty = "51", alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = MIU_VALVE),
    color = "black", shape = 21,
    stroke = 0.5, size = 2
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = label),
    hjust = 0, vjust = 1.1,
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color.gradient, name = "Chamber") +
  theme_hm +
  ylab(expression(atop("Percent of growing season", "emissions"))) +
  xlab("Temperature treatment (ºC above ambient)") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4)) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_y")

ggpubr::ggarrange(annual + theme(legend.position = "right"),
  top_pct_fig + theme(legend.position = "none"),
  nrow = 2, ncol = 1,
  labels = "auto"
)

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/top_pct_comb_annual.jpg",
  dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 5
)

top_pct_pres <- top_pct %>%
  filter(name == "Top 1% of measurements") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp_C, y = value)) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", color = "black",
    data = ~ subset(.x, p < 0.05)
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = MIU_VALVE),
    color = "black", shape = 21,
    stroke = 0.5, size = 2
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = label_df %>%
      filter(name == "Top 1% of measurements"),
    aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = label),
    hjust = 0, vjust = 1.1,
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color.gradient, name = "Chamber") +
  theme_hm +
  ylab(expression(atop("Top 1% of fluxes", "(% of growing season emissions)"))) +
  xlab("Temperature treatment (ºC above ambient)") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3))

ggsave(
  top_pct_pres,
  filename = "../figures/top_pct_pres.jpg",
  dpi = 300, width = 4, height = 5
)
```

Manual sampling underestimates

```{r}
reps <- 10000
samples_per_week <- 1
set.seed(4700)

df <- part %>%
  mutate(week = month(date))

df_out_fullday <- df %>%
  group_by(week, MIU_VALVE) %>%
  reframe(
    rep = seq_len(reps),
    flux = replicate(
      reps,
      mean(sample(CH4_umol_m2_h, samples_per_week))
    ),
    time = "full day"
  )

df_out_daytime <- df %>%
  group_by(week, MIU_VALVE) %>%
  filter(hour(DateTime) %in% 9:4) %>%
  reframe(
    rep = seq_len(reps),
    flux = replicate(
      reps,
      mean(sample(CH4_umol_m2_h, samples_per_week))
    ),
    time = "full day"
  )

df_out <- df_out_fullday

to_plot <- df_out %>%
  group_by(MIU_VALVE, rep, time) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_hourly = mean(flux, na.rm = T),
    tot_hourly = mean_hourly / 1000 / 1000 * (365 * 24)
  ) %>% # Convert hourly fluxes to annual)
  left_join(annual_df %>%
    rename(tot_real = annual_flux)) %>%
  group_by(MIU_VALVE, time) %>%
  summarize(median = median(tot_hourly / tot_real * 100 - 100)) %>%
  mutate(
    time = factor(time,
      levels = c("full day", "wl", "daytime", "growth"),
      labels = c(
        "Weekly (all)", "No standing\nwater",
        "Daytime", "Growing\nseason"
      )
    ),
    Temp_C = sub(" ºC", "", str_extract(as.character(MIU_VALVE), "[0-9]+\\.*[0-9]* ºC")),
    Temp_C = as.numeric(sub("mb", "0", Temp_C))
  )

sims_label <- make_lm_label(
  data = to_plot,
  xvar = "Temp_C",
  yvar = "median"
)

sims <- to_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = as.numeric(Temp_C), y = median, group = "group")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey85") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = MIU_VALVE), shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.5) +
  geom_text(
    data = sims_label,
    aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = label),
    hjust = 0, vjust = 1.1,
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-0.5, 6.5),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = color.gradient,
    name = "Chamber"
  ) +
  theme_hm +
  theme(legend.title.position = "top") +
  ylab("Manual sampling bias (%)") +
  xlab("Temperature treatment (ºC above ambient)") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2))

sims
ggsave(sims, filename = "../figures/Figure 4 - Simulations.jpg", dpi = 300, width = 3, height = 4)

to_plot_dist <- df_out %>%
  group_by(MIU_VALVE, rep, time) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_hourly = mean(flux, na.rm = T),
    tot_hourly = mean_hourly / 1000 / 1000 * (365 * 24)
  ) %>% # Convert hourly fluxes to annual)
  left_join(annual_df %>%
    rename(tot_real = annual_flux)) %>%
  group_by(MIU_VALVE, time) %>%
  mutate(
    pct = (tot_hourly / tot_real * 100 - 100),
    time = factor(time,
      levels = c("full day", "wl", "daytime", "growth"),
      labels = c(
        "Weekly (all)", "No standing\nwater",
        "Daytime", "Growing\nseason"
      )
    ),
    Temp_C = sub(" ºC", "", str_extract(as.character(MIU_VALVE), "[0-9]+\\.*[0-9]* ºC")),
    Temp_C = as.numeric(sub("mb", "0", Temp_C))
  )

sims_dist <- to_plot_dist %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = as.numeric(Temp_C), y = pct, fill = MIU_VALVE)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey85") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  geom_violin(aes(color = MIU_VALVE),
    draw_quantiles = c(0.5),
    position = "identity", alpha = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = color.gradient,
    name = "Chamber"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = color.gradient,
    name = "Chamber"
  ) +
  theme_hm +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-0.5, 6.5),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  theme(legend.title.position = "top") +
  ylab("Manual sampling bias (%)") +
  xlab("Temperature treatment (ºC above ambient)") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2))

with_dist <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  a = sims +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 5)) +
    ylab("Manual sampling bias\n(median %)") +
    xlab("Temperature treatment (ºC above ambient)"),
  b = sims_dist + theme(legend.position = "none"),
  guides = "collect",
  axes = "collect_x"
) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "a",
    theme = theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  ) &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold"))

with_dist

ggsave(with_dist,
  filename = "../figures/Figure 4 - Simulations with dist.jpg",
  dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 4
)
```
